summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Budget Control System MVP - Core functionality working with 88.9% backend success rate and functional frontend with some display issues

critical_bugs.impact: Admin users cannot view audit trail
Cannot configure WhatsApp and email notifications

ui_bugs.issue: KPI cards not displaying data (0 cards found vs expected 4)
Month/Year selectors not visible on dashboard
Console errors about chart width/height being -1

integration_issues.issue: No monthly budget options available in dropdown

issues: Dashboard data not displaying despite backend APIs working

passed_tests: Login page loads with corporate branding
First user auto-elevation to super_admin role
Budget creation with monthly periods auto-generation
success_percentage: Backend: 88.9% (16/18 tests passed), Frontend: 75% (core functionality working with display issues)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix audit logs endpoint (520 error), Fix notification config endpoint (520 error), Debug dashboard KPI cards display issue, Fix chart rendering problems on dashboard, Investigate monthly budget dropdown empty state
